reviews.review_description: With so many VR games focusing on high intensity, it’s a nice change of pace to just sit down and solve some puzzles. This is a great game to just chill out with after a long day at work. I’m looking forward to see what other puzzles will be added as time goes by.

Sudoku with some fun animations that keep you engaged. The interface is nice and slick, the number picker works well. I def had to guess a bunch of times, but it highlights when you done something very wrong, which is much appreciated :)
